x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sufficient CSM case history enables Now Assist to learn customer patterns and power AI similar case suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow CSM case volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: descriptions, account linkage, and resolution notes. Target: 500+ cases in the trailing 12 months for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI learning.
